name: ECS Comprehensive Benchmark
description: Downloads and runs the upstream spiritLHLS/ecs Shell ECS/VPS comprehensive benchmark wrapper. The upstream script checks system, CPU, memory, disk, streaming unlock, TikTok unlock, return route, IP quality, mail ports, and speed tests. It may install dependencies, update the package manager, consume significant resources, and generate outbound traffic; full/simple modes upload results to pastebin by default, so it is not recommended for production hosts.

parameters.name: ECS_MODE
parameters.description: Run mode passed to upstream -m, for example 1; leave empty to use upstream interactive/default behavior.

parameters.name: ECS_ENGLISH
parameters.description: Whether to request English output; true/1/yes/on adds -en, false/0/no/off disables it. Empty defaults to English for this wrapper.

parameters.name: ECS_ROUTE_TARGET
parameters.description: Route or backtrace target passed to upstream -r.

parameters.name: ECS_TARGET_IPV4
parameters.description: Target IPv4 address passed to upstream -i.

parameters.name: ECS_BASE_ONLY
parameters.description: When true/1/yes/on, add -base to run only base-information related tests.

parameters.name: ECS_CPU_TYPE
parameters.description: CPU test type passed to upstream -ctype.

parameters.name: ECS_DISK_TYPE
parameters.description: Disk test type passed to upstream -dtype.

parameters.name: ECS_MULTI_DISK
parameters.description: When true/1/yes/on, add -mdisk to enable the upstream multi-disk test option.

parameters.name: ECS_SPEEDTEST_SOURCE
parameters.description: Speedtest source type passed to upstream -stype.

parameters.name: ECS_SKIP_SPEEDTEST
parameters.description: When true/1/yes/on, add -bansp to skip speedtest-related checks.

parameters.name: ECS_SKIP_UPLOAD
parameters.description: When true/1/yes/on, add -banup to skip result upload.

parameters.name: ECS_EXTRA_ARGS
parameters.description: Additional arguments appended to upstream ecs.sh. Parsed with shell-style quoting when python3 is available; otherwise split conservatively on whitespace. eval is not used.
